reason: This finding involves enforcing a maximum password age for existing user accounts via the chage command, aligning with standard STIG password policy hardening. The remediation script targets only non-compliant accounts and follows common security practices, posing minimal risk of system breakage or access loss when applied correctly.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Potential user inconvenience if passwords expire and require immediate change; but no critical service disruption expected
